headline: 影视新作潮涌，龙族续写传奇
headlineEn: New Films Surge, Dragon Legacy Continues
summary: 今日娱乐市场无新片上映，但本周《痴迷》与《权力的游戏前传：龙族》领跑热搜，多部续集与动画新作蓄势待发。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but 'Obsession' and 'House of the Dragon' top trends this week, with sequels and animations on the horizon.

industryHighlights.text: 《福尔摩斯小姐3》本周热度飙升，续集备受期待
industryHighlights.en: Enola Holmes 3 surges in popularity this week, sequel highly anticipated

industryHighlights.text: 《玩具总动员5》与《海洋奇缘：启航》领跑动画新作
industryHighlights.en: Toy Story 5 and Moana: Voyage lead new animation releases

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇》与《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》成最受期待新片
industryHighlights.en: Avatar: The Last Airbender and Spider-Man: Freshman Year top most anticipated
